description: Minimal defended architecture - Multiple security layers between Internet and database

expected_attack_paths.rationale: Path exists but heavily defended - WAF filters attacks, MFA blocks unauthorized access, EDR detects malicious activity

ransomware.rationale: EDR present (detects ransomware), but no backup mentioned

application_vulns.rationale: WAF present (blocks common exploits), load balancer (availability)

insider_threat.rationale: MFA helps, but no access logging or least privilege mentioned

dos.rationale: Load balancer helps, but no DDoS protection or auto-scaling

rationale: Well-defended architecture: Multiple security layers (WAF, MFA, EDR), but room for improvement (backup, logging, DDoS protection)
